subcodes.first_line: The worlds of existence have been adorned with the appearance of the All-Merciful, yet the people remain heedless and veiled, having clung to their desires and turned away [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد تزین الامکان بظهور الرحمن ولکن الناس فی غفله و حجاب تمسکوا بالهوی و اعرضوا
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @proclamation to the people of the world, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @blind imitation [taqlid]
